fields.Name: Conversations.DefaultAgentID
fields.Comments: Global default conversation-manager agent. Used by @memberjunction/conversations-runtime's DefaultAgentResolver as step 3 of the resolution chain (explicit widget input → app-scoped Application Setting → THIS global setting → code-const Sage fallback). An app-scoped row with the same Name takes precedence for that application. Deployments wanting a different system-wide default agent rewrite the Value to a different @lookup reference (e.g. another agent's Name); deployments wanting a per-app default add a new row with the appropriate ApplicationID.
